text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Riiiing...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Geez, you're loud! Are you tryingto destroy my eardrums?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: B-b-but... I m-mean! Sob... The threeof us have finally... finally...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: WAAAAAAHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Calm down, Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Are you planning to cry out all of the<n>carrot juice
you just drank for our<n>toast?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
During lunchtime, my attention is<n>drawn to a
sudden burst of noise and<n>activity. I look over to
see Narita<n>Taishin, Biwa Hayahide, and Winning
Ticket together.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket is honest, full of<n>energy, and wears
her heart on her<n>sleeve. She's determined to
become<n>a Derby champion.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide bases her running on<n>a winning
equation she personally<n>calculated and boasts an
overwhelming record of consecutive<n>victories.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
They both appear to be great friends<n>with Narita
Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But I do understand where your joy<n>is coming
from, Ticket. I'm happy too.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: After all, the three of us have all<n>finally debuted.
Uh-huh! That's right! And I... I...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Waaaah! I want us to keep racing<n>against each
other foreveeerrr!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'd rather not. You're way too noisy.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What?!

But come on! You're going for the<n>Triple Crown,
right?! That's my goal<n>too!
I'm gonna be a Derbychampiooon!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Heh. While I do understand just how<n>capable you
two are...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I won't let that stop me from<n>emerging victorious.
I'll be the one<n>who claims the throne of the Triple
Crown champion.
Hah. Says you.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: During afternoon training...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, my ears still hurt... It's all<n>Ticket's fault.
choice_data_list: You three looked like you were having a blast.
You three looked like you were having a blast.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? You were watching us? Wait,that's what you think it lookedlike?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's not like we're good friends or<n>anything. It's
just...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
When you're new at the academy,<n>they start you
doing 1,000-meter runs<n>to get used to racing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I didn't have the patience to take it<n>slow, so I
decided to run 2,400<n>instead.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But then those two said they'd run<n>the same for
some reason.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, that's how the three of us<n>ended up as
rivals.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, Biwa Hayahide's moves are<n>timed so
perfectly... It's like she<n>already knows how the
entire race is<n>going to play out!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Ticket's pretty impressive too! Her<n>explosive
power is out of this world!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Ugh, damn those two!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm not gonna lose to theeem!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I wasn't used to running<n>the classic
distances then, and in<n>normal circumstances, I
wouldn't<n>have been able to put up much of a
fight.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But for some reason, I managed to<n>summon up
enough strength.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Dang, it's still too much for me to run<n>the whole
2,400 meters well...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (But I managed to get a better time<n>than usual.)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wow, wow, wow, WOOOOW!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whoa! What the hell are you—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Your name's Narita Taishin, right?!<n>I'm Winning
Ticket!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I got all shivery watching your finalsprint! That was awesome!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You're strong, so I claim you as my<n>rival! Run
another race with me,<n>pleeeaaase!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Another race? That sounds like an<n>entertaining
idea you have there.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Would it be alright if I join as well?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What the... What's with you two?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ticket's been a pain in the butt since<n>then, and
Hayahide's just kinda<n>been around too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That's all.
choice_data_list:
So your first race against each other was what
brought you together.

So your first race against each other was what
brought you together.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't the first time I raced one of<n>them,
though...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Nothing. Anyway, the point is that<n>we're not good
friends or anything.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But... I do know just how good they<n>are.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That goes for both Ticket and<n>Hayahide. I don't
wanna admit it, but<n>they're really good.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
They're both going for the Triple<n>Crown too. You
know what that<n>means, right?
choice_data_list: There's no way we can lose to them!
There's no way we can lose to them!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Glad we're on the same page. Let's<n>get to
training already.

We dedicate the day to preparing for<n>the inevitable
battles Narita Taishin<n>must face against Winning
Ticket and<n>Biwa Hayahide.
